titleStmt.title: SII 35.3: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 3. (A.R. No. 290 of 1952-53.) NĀYAKALLU, KURNOOL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Four sides of a pillar in front of the Īśvara temple.
This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Akālavarsha Pṛithvivallabha, is dated Śaka 889, Prabhava, solar eclipse. The details correspond to A.D. 967, July 10, Wednesday.

It states that the Vīrabaḷañjas of Naṟavāḍi-500 granted as dēvamāna, specified portions on every unit of such commodities as areca-nut, turmeric, etc., to god Gavaṟēśvara on the occasion of a solar eclipse when Nanni-Saḷukki Rāchamalla was ruling. The Baḷañjas are introduced with a long prasasti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakanṛpakāḷātīta saṁva
tsaraṁgaḷ 889 varisamāge pra
bhavameṁba saṁvatsaraṁ prava¨rtti
se Akālava[¨rṣa] śrī prituvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ rājyābhivriddhi
prava¨rddhamāna vijayamuttarōta
ra Ācandrā[¨rka]tārakaṁ saluttamire ©
svasti samadhigatapaṁñcamahāsabda
mahāsāmanta nannisaḷukiśrīracama
llānāḷuttire © svasti samastabhuvanā
śraya lōkavikhyāta paṁcasatavīra
sasanalabdānēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛ
ta satyasēvācāracāritra na
yavinayavinyāsa vīrabaḷaṁ
jadha¨rmmaparipaḷaṇa visu
ddhaguḍḍadvajavirājitaranūna
sāhasasamāliṁgitava
kṣastaḷaṁ bhuvanaparākramānū
ta vāsudēvakhaṇḍaḷīmūla
bhadrādbhavaraddhatriṁśa vēḷāvuḷa
muṁ Aṣṭadasapaṭṭaṇamuṁ cau
ṣaṣṭiyōgapīṭhamuṁ Aṟu
vattanālku kaṭhikastanamunanā
dīśābhyantara mūnāḷkuṁdeseya
śrayama Eṇṭunaḍa padināṟuvā
ruṁgavaṟeyuṁgattigaruṁ Aṁ
kakāṟaruṁ cīkaruṁ cāritaruṁga

ṁgaruṁ gavuṇḍasvamiya seṭṭigu
ttaruṁ samastaṁ balmaridaṇḍa hasta
rācāragaligaḷala causaṁpannara
geye bhēriyāge bhautiye mā
ddaḷeyāge maruve guṟiyāge
pritiviye kaḷanāge samudrameyeni
dbhadhigeyāge dēvara divyāyu
dhaṁgaḷe Āyudhayāge vicārameṁ
ba kaucamaṁ toḷdu naniyeṁba palage
yuṁ piḍidu nāṇeṁba mēluda poḍedike cē
ra cōḻa pāṁṇḍyaṁ matte maṇḍalika mahā
sāmaṁta cakrava¨rtigaḷmodalāge
nayadha¨rmmaśīlācāraguṇa
ṁgaḷindaṁ pratipālisi komārā
gi paṁsuṁbeyeṁba pasadanaṁ
goṇḍu baddhajaṭhamamane A
rasuyādi Appaṟayanema
ṟuva¨rkkamāḍi kṣamayeṁba
bāḷakiḻtu krōdhameṁba sattuva
niṟidu kāḍigella bhagavatiya
varaprasāda brahmārakula su
¨ryya vaṁsadavaru Ayyāvo
ṟeya puraparamēsvararīsvara
putrarāgi pañcamahāsabdaṁga
ḷuṁ mahāpaṟe pōṣaṇamuṁ svēta
dhvajavilaṁbitarāgi padamaggaba
lamaggaṁgaḷinda Aḍadiyaddana
giri śikharagaḷvaragaḷaṁ pākukarī
turaga jātyasvaṁgaḷu manelālava
ḍakakoḷaka kasturī ka¨rppuragaru kuṁkuma

paṁkaja dijadī tailaśrīkhaṇḍamē
nugandha dravyagaḷuṁ mapaneṇṭatī
ḷada dhānyarāsigaḷumakraya vikraya
vyavasāya guṇaṁgaḷinda paḍedu pū
¨rṇṇistitiyāḷaṁda suṁkaccayayō ca
krava¨rttiya bhaṇḍārama tivi mikku
daṟoḷaṣṭadaśradaṇnāpaḻdarisida ca
tva samayādigaḷalliyō visi
ṣṭa vidagdha paṇḍita dvijamunijana
gaḷge baisakeyduvarāsi¨rvvacana
ṁgaḷaṁ nityamatyaṁtamāgekoḷutpa
mahādēvarū Iṣṭadēvarāge kā
manīya kāmabhōgōpa bhā
ṁgaḷa salisutūbalci śrīmatu
naḻavaḍi Ainuṟara baḷaṁja
mu sū¨ryyagrahaṇadandu ga
vaṟēsvaradēva¨rgge dēvamānamaṁ
vāmarāsibhaṭarara mukhya ma
gaṁ koṭṭa stiti A¨rddhapaḻu Ikkiṭṭa
ṟida paṟinoḷellā Eraḍu poṟeno
¨rvva pandiyoḷū māna Adauvadha
nya Ellā Ikuvudu patēṇḍa
māḍi Arisinada pēṟiṁge
dīpa Asuṇḍiyiyapēṟi
ṁge dīpa Aḍakeya pē
ṟiṁge vīsava Ikkuvudu

Ī stitiyanaḻidavaru padi
neṇṭu paṭṭaṇamu baraṇāsi
yuṁ śrīpa¨rvvatamuṁ Aḻi
davaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasundarā ṣaṣṭi
va¨rṣasahaśrāṇiṁ viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi . Iṁti stiti
yoḷu koṭṭa prabhugaḷu nā
yakalla rēviseṭṭiyu kā
ḍammaseṭṭiyu goraṇḍaya vā
neyaṁmanu musiyaṇanu
barakūra coḻipanu kaṭiyanu
pelakuṟikeya nagapanu Araka
ḷayanu guḍiyāra candanu pōta
yanu kuṁkūvanūra rācayanu ma
ḻalbhayyanu keṟeya beḷgali
ya nakarayyanu cintamanu pi
riya guḍiyūra vammayanu ma
ṁgayanu Aḷdaḷa Āyyamayyanu
poḻalammanu baiḷdaṟuvina bhi
malayanu Aggapayanu
duddhaḷa vaijayyanu kēsariyu
Ajjaya pōḻala duggeyanu po
ḻalukilla kacayanu Ainū®va
Ī dha¨rmma Ācandrā¨rka salguṁ
Digital edition of SII 35.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
